description: Horizontal lazy-loading grid; children are arranged into fixed rows that scroll horizontally. Supports static children or data-driven template mode.

children.description: Static child views placed into the grid

template.description: Template rendered once per data row, each filling the next grid cell; set rows via setElementRows

rows.description: Row definitions; each entry is {minimum: number} for fixed height or {flexible: true} for flexible; default [flexible]

flexible.description: When true, row takes available space

states.content.description: All data rows as [[String]]; use getElementRows/setElementRows
